name: pi-proxy-models
description_en: Pi coding-agent extension that exposes CLIProxyAPIPlus models (Claude, Gemini, OpenAI/Codex, Copilot, Kiro, GLM, Qwen, ...) to pi's model picker, routing each family through its native streaming API (anthropic-messages, openai-completions, google-generati
description_zh: Pi编程代理扩展，将CLIProxyAPIPlus模型（Claude、Gemini、OpenAI/Codex、Copilot、Kiro、GLM、Qwen等）暴露给pi的模型选择器，通过其原生流式API（anthropic-messages、openai-completions、google-generati）路由每个系列
